task: When a project scope is too large to finish on time, decide how to reduce scope without losing objectives.
reasoning_trace: Identify core objective: deliver analytics dashboard MVP.
List backlog items: real-time alerts (optional), custom theming (optional).
Reduce scope by deferring optional modules; keep core analytics.
answer: Trim optional real-time alerts and theming to deliver the analytics MVP on schedule.
meta_lesson: When timelines slip, rank backlog items by objective alignment and defer low-impact work.

task: A proof attempt diverges due to considering too general a case; reduce the scope appropriately.
reasoning_trace: Original goal: prove statement for all graphs.
Observation: counterexamples arise in non-planar graphs.
Reduce scope to planar graphs where lemma applies.
Proceed with proof under narrowed conditions and note limitation.
answer: Restrict the proof to planar graphs where the lemma holds; document the limited scope.
meta_lesson: When global proofs fail, narrow the domain to where supporting lemmas apply and state the constraint.
